message:
fix: remove local charmed-bubbletea patch that breaks CI builds

The uncommented [patch.crates-io] section forced a local path dependency
on charmed-bubbletea, which does not exist in CI. Replace the
`try_downcast()` call (only available in the unpublished local crate)
with `is()` + `downcast().unwrap()` which works with the published
charmed-bubbletea 0.2.0 from crates.io.

Fixes part of #5.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
